encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the emergency bulkheads to open the path to the Engineering Bay.
Disabling the turret provides the necessary power surge to unlock the Reactor Control access hatch.

pickup.name: Reactor Core Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Critical item to stop the reactor meltdown

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker allows the engineer to bypass the final security lock using the Logic Override Chip to reach the boss room.

boss.name: Sentient Central Intelligence
boss.victory_condition: Insert the stabilizer into the central processing unit while the boss is staggered.

output.objective: Restart the station reactor before oxygen depletion.
output.reward: Command Override Access to the entire sector.

output.setting: Abandoned orbital research station orbiting a dying pulsar

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the override switch alerts the security patrol in the server room
Downloading the encrypted data log activates the station lockdown and spawns the security drone
Opening the airlock bridge allows entry to the core chamber for the final battle

boss.name: The Timeless Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Channel the resonance core through the Chronostaff while the Overlord is weakened

output.objective: Retrieve the station data logs and disable the reactor to prevent a temporal rift
output.reward: The Chronomancer's Relic: A device capable of rewinding local events by 5 seconds

pickup.name: thermal coolant canister
pickup.effect: lowers room temperature to slow biological movement

encounters.trigger: destroying the drone unlocks the airlock to the cryogenic lab

pickup.name: bio-catalyst vial
pickup.effect: reacts explosively with synthetic organic tissue

encounters.trigger: securing the vial triggers an alarm leading to the reactor core

pickup.name: central security keycard
pickup.effect: grants access to the boss chamber

encounters.trigger: using the keycard opens the doors to the main command deck

boss.name: The Alchemist's Shadow
boss.victory_condition: neutralize the phantom using the residual thermal coolant

output.objective: infiltrate the command deck and purge the station's AI

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sprite unlocks the blast door to the Research Lab.
Stopping the Bot releases the magnetic keycard to the Boss Arena.
Short-circuiting the drone powers up the Boss Room lift.

boss.name: The Galactic Jukebox
boss.victory_condition: Successfully distract the Jukebox with the Decoy and land a final hit with the Neon Slingshot.

output.objective: Retrieve the stolen star-map from the corrupted Jukebox.
output.reward: The Golden Crank of Infinite Energy
